HediffDef.label: unstable FEV exposure
HediffDef.description: Pending scaffold marker for an unrefined FEV transformation. The requested one-in-three centaur, super mutant, or body-destruction outcome needs a custom surgery worker.

HediffDef.label: refined FEV exposure
HediffDef.description: Pending scaffold marker for a refined FEV transformation. The requested 50-50 centaur or super mutant result still needs a custom surgery worker.

HediffDef.label: isolated FEV exposure
HediffDef.description: Pending scaffold marker for an isolated FEV transformation. The guaranteed first- or second-generation super mutant result still needs a custom surgery worker.

HediffDef.label: nightkin
HediffDef.description: A heavy FEV mutation that darkens the subject and pushes their mind toward violent instability. This scaffold includes the mental-break pressure and an example body overlay path, but automatic invisibility-gizmo wiring still needs a custom hook if Anomaly is not required.

TraitDef.description: Violent hallucinations and dissociation associated with advanced Nightkin instability.

li.label: nightkin schizophrenia
li.description: This pawn is prone to volatile dissociation, extended wandering, and aggressive mental collapse.
